tldr_zh: OpenAI挖角Apple Vision Pro高管，Anthropic模型獲美政府授權，亞洲AI新創對標Mythos打破出口禁令。
tldr_en: OpenAI hires Apple Vision Pro VP; Trump admin authorizes Anthropic Mythos for 100+ US orgs; Asian AI startups challenge export restrictions.

items.title_zh: OpenAI挖角Apple Vision Pro執行副總裁加入硬體團隊
items.title_en: Apple Vision Pro Exec Paul Meade Reportedly Leaving for OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 負責Apple Vision Pro頭戴裝置的副總裁Paul Meade將離職加入OpenAI硬體團隊。這反映OpenAI對硬體與AR/VR領域的重視，意味著OpenAI可能在探索新的硬體產品線。
items.summary_en: Paul Meade, Apple VP overseeing Vision Pro, is reportedly joining OpenAI's hardware division. This signals OpenAI's increased focus on hardware development and potential new product ventures beyond software.

items.title_zh: 美國政府授權Anthropic Mythos供百家企業與機構使用
items.title_en: Trump Admin Releases Anthropic Mythos for 100+ US Companies and Agencies
items.summary_zh: 美國政府授權超過100家美國企業和政府機構使用Anthropic的Mythos 5模型，包括他們的非美籍員工。這代表美國政府對本土AI模型的支持，並打破了先前的出口限制。
items.summary_en: Over 100 US companies and government agencies are authorized to use Anthropic's Mythos 5, including non-American employees. This reflects government support for domestically developed AI while easing previous export restrictions.

items.title_zh: 亞洲AI新創推出類Mythos模型對抗出口禁令
items.title_en: Asian AI Startups Launch Mythos-Like Models to Counter Export Bans
items.summary_zh: 面對Anthropic長期出口禁令的拖累，亞洲AI新創正推出具有Mythos同等能力的新模型。專家警告，美國AI實驗室可能永久喪失亞洲這個龐大市場。
items.summary_en: Asian AI startups are launching competitive models matching Mythos capabilities to circumvent export restrictions. US AI labs risk permanently losing the massive Asian market due to prolonged export bans.

items.title_zh: 紐時控控Microsoft為OpenAI建侵權超算違反版權
items.title_en: NYT Alleges Microsoft Built Copyright-Infringing Supercomputer for OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 在最高法院駁回Sony案後，紐約時報更新控訴，指控Microsoft為OpenAI建造超級電腦以侵犯版權。這是對AI訓練數據來源合法性的持續質疑。
items.summary_en: NYT shifts copyright claims after SCOTUS ruling, alleging Microsoft built a supercomputer to help OpenAI infringe copyrights. Raises ongoing concerns about the legality of AI training data sources.

items.title_zh: 蘋果尋求許可採購黑名單中國供應商記憶體晶片
items.title_en: Apple Seeks Permission to Buy RAM from Blacklisted Chinese Supplier CXMT
items.summary_zh: Apple向川普政府申請例外許可，要購買被五角大廈列入黑名單、疑有解放軍背景的中國企業CXMT的記憶體晶片。起因是RAM和儲存價格飆漲對供應鏈造成巨大壓力。
items.summary_en: Apple requests exemption from Trump administration to purchase RAM from CXMT, a Pentagon-blacklisted Chinese supplier with alleged PLA ties. Surging memory prices have strained Apple's supply chain.

items.title_zh: 美國FCC主席藏匿與馬斯克DOGE通訊遭控浪費法庭時間
items.title_en: FCC Accused of Hiding Chairman Carr's Messages with Musk and DOGE
items.summary_zh: FCC遭指控隱瞞主席Carr與馬斯克及DOGE的通訊紀錄，法庭指責FCC
items.summary_en: FCC faces accusations of refusing to disclose Chairman Carr's communications with Elon Musk and DOGE, with court filings claiming the agency has wasted a year of court time.

items.title_zh: 加州7月起禁止串流廣告過度吵雜違反新法
items.title_en: California Bans Obnoxiously Loud Streaming Ads Starting July 1
items.summary_zh: 加州與伊利諾州通過法律，自7月1日起禁止串流服務播放過度吵雜的廣告。此舉促使業者改進廣告音量設計，維護使用者體驗。
items.summary_en: California and Illinois pass laws banning excessively loud streaming ads starting July 1. The measure incentivizes services to reduce ad volume, protecting user experience.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯政府批蘋果屏蔽App促民眾改用Android
items.title_en: Russian Government Lashes Out at Apple for Blocking Key Russian Apps
items.summary_zh: Apple屏蔽多款俄羅斯應用後，俄國政府譴責此舉並建議民眾改用Android手機。體現了地緣政治對科技生態的影響。
items.summary_en: After Apple blocks key Russian apps, Russian government calls the decision "bizarre" and urges citizens to switch to Android. Highlights geopolitical tensions affecting tech ecosystems.

items.title_zh: 委內瑞拉連環強震死亡人數攀升至1430人
items.title_en: Venezuela Earthquakes Death Toll Rises to 1430 as International Rescue Efforts Underway
items.summary_zh: 委內瑞拉遭連環強震襲擊，官方證實死亡人數已達1430人，數百人仍被困瓦礫堆下。國際救援隊伍已抵達現場搜救，包括一名困32小時後獲救的18天大嬰兒。
items.summary_en: Venezuela's consecutive earthquakes have killed 1,430 people with hundreds still trapped under rubble. International rescue teams have arrived; notably, an 18-day-old baby was rescued after 32 hours trapped.

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪創紀錄丹麥兩度改寫高溫德國捷克破40度
items.title_en: Extreme Heatwave Breaks Records Across Central Europe; Denmark Peaks at 37°C
items.summary_zh: 一股強烈熱浪席捲歐洲，丹麥一日內兩度改寫歷史高溫紀錄達37度，德國和捷克也突破40度。約1.5億人經歷35度以上高溫。
items.summary_en: A severe heatwave breaks records across Central Europe. Denmark sets two new record highs at 37°C in a single day; Germany and Czech Republic exceed 40°C. Some 150 million people experience temperatures over 35°C.

items.title_zh: 美軍空襲伊朗多處設施回應無人機攻擊商船
items.title_en: US Strikes Iran Targets After Attack on Cargo Ship
items.summary_zh: 美軍中央司令部發動新一輪空襲，鎖定伊朗多處設施，稱是對伊朗持續無人機攻擊商船的直接回應。伊朗則指控美國違反協議。
items.summary_en: US Central Command strikes Iranian targets in response to persistent drone attacks on cargo ships. Iran accuses the US of violating their agreement and retaliates against American military facilities.

items.title_zh: 伊朗六月通膨率飆升至88.6%食品價格翻倍
items.title_en: Iran's Inflation Soars to 88.6% in June Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary_zh: 伊朗官方數據顯示，在國際制裁與中東戰爭雙重衝擊下，6月通膨率已飆升至88.6%歷史高位。食品價格更翻倍上漲。
items.summary_en: Iran's official data shows inflation surged to 88.6% in June amid international sanctions and Middle East conflict impacts. Food prices have doubled, exacerbating economic crisis.
